modules.title: Module 7: Context API and Global State

content.introduction: React is a popular JavaScript library for building user interfaces, particularly for web applications. This course covers the fundamentals of React, including components, state management, and more.

keyConcepts.title: Components
keyConcepts.description: Reusable building blocks for UI elements in React.

keyConcepts.title: JSX
keyConcepts.description: A syntax extension for JavaScript used in React to describe UI.

keyConcepts.title: Virtual DOM
keyConcepts.description: A lightweight representation of the DOM for efficient updates.

content.introduction: Python is the go-to language for AI and machine learning. This course teaches Python fundamentals tailored for AI applications, from basic syntax to advanced libraries.

keyConcepts.title: Python Syntax
keyConcepts.description: Basic rules and structure of Python programming.

keyConcepts.title: Data Structures
keyConcepts.description: Lists, dictionaries, and other data containers in Python.

keyConcepts.title: AI Libraries
keyConcepts.description: Essential libraries like NumPy, Pandas, and Scikit-learn for AI.

content.introduction: AI Ethics and Bias explores the moral implications of artificial intelligence, focusing on fairness, accountability, and responsible development of AI systems.

keyConcepts.title: Ethical AI
keyConcepts.description: Developing AI systems that align with human values and principles.

keyConcepts.title: Bias Mitigation
keyConcepts.description: Techniques to identify and reduce bias in AI algorithms.

keyConcepts.title: Responsible AI
keyConcepts.description: Ensuring AI development considers societal impact and ethical concerns.

content.introduction: MongoDB is a NoSQL database that stores data in flexible, JSON-like documents. It is widely used for scalable and modern web applications.

keyConcepts.title: NoSQL Database
keyConcepts.description: Stores data in flexible formats instead of tables.

keyConcepts.title: Documents
keyConcepts.description: MongoDB stores data as JSON-like documents.

keyConcepts.title: Collections
keyConcepts.description: Groups of documents similar to tables in SQL.

course.title: PostgreSQL
course.subtitle: Learn PostgreSQL Database Fundamentals and SQL Operations

content.introduction: PostgreSQL is a powerful, open-source relational database system known for its reliability, robustness, and rich feature set. Learn the fundamentals of PostgreSQL database management and SQL operations.

keyConcepts.title: Relational Database
keyConcepts.description: Organize data in tables with relationships and structured queries.

keyConcepts.title: SQL Operations
keyConcepts.description: Master Create, Read, Update, and Delete operations on databases.

keyConcepts.title: Data Integrity
keyConcepts.description: Ensure data consistency and reliability with advanced PostgreSQL features.

lessons.title: What is Data Science?
lessons.topic: Define data science, its interdisciplinary nature, and why it is foundational for AI-driven decision making.

lessons.title: Applications of Data Science
lessons.topic: Explore practical applications of data science in healthcare, finance, e-commerce, and recommendation systems.

lessons.title: Data Science Lifecycle
lessons.topic: Explain the end-to-end data science lifecycle from problem framing to deployment and monitoring.

modules.title: Module 2: Python Basics for Data Science

lessons.title: Python for Data Science Overview
lessons.topic: Understand why Python is preferred for data science and review its ecosystem for analysis workflows.

lessons.title: Variables, Data Types, and Operators
lessons.topic: Learn Python variables, core data types, and operators used in data processing scripts.

lessons.title: Working with Libraries (NumPy, Pandas)
lessons.topic: Use NumPy and Pandas fundamentals for efficient numerical computation and tabular data handling.

lessons.title: Introduction to Pandas
lessons.topic: Introduce Pandas data structures and core capabilities for reading, transforming, and summarizing datasets.

lessons.title: DataFrames and Series
lessons.topic: Work with DataFrames and Series to perform filtering, indexing, grouping, and aggregation.

lessons.title: Data Cleaning Techniques
lessons.topic: Apply practical Pandas-based data cleaning methods for duplicates, outliers, and inconsistent records.

lessons.title: Introduction to Data Visualization
lessons.topic: Cover visualization principles to communicate trends, comparisons, and distributions effectively.

lessons.title: Using Matplotlib and Seaborn
lessons.topic: Build visualizations with Matplotlib and Seaborn for exploratory analysis and reporting.

lessons.title: Creating Graphs and Charts
lessons.topic: Create bar, line, scatter, and distribution charts while selecting the right graph for each use case.

lessons.title: Descriptive Statistics
lessons.topic: Learn descriptive statistics metrics such as mean, median, mode, variance, and standard deviation.

lessons.title: Probability Basics
lessons.topic: Understand foundational probability concepts including events, conditional probability, and Bayes intuition.

lessons.title: Data Distributions
lessons.topic: Explain normal and non-normal distributions and how distribution shape affects analysis decisions.

lessons.title: Understanding Data
lessons.topic: Perform initial EDA to inspect schema, data quality, cardinality, and summary signals.

lessons.title: Data Cleaning
lessons.topic: Use EDA insights to clean missing values, outliers, and formatting issues before modeling.

lessons.title: Visualization for Insights
lessons.topic: Create EDA visualizations that surface actionable insights and data relationships.

lessons.title: Feature Selection
lessons.topic: Select relevant predictive features using filter, wrapper, and embedded selection approaches.

lessons.title: Feature Transformation
lessons.topic: Transform raw variables with encoding, scaling, and normalization techniques for model readiness.

lessons.title: Handling Missing Values
lessons.topic: Apply imputation and missingness strategies to reduce bias and preserve predictive signal.

lessons.title: Introduction to Machine Learning
lessons.topic: Introduce supervised and unsupervised learning workflows, model training, and evaluation basics.

lessons.title: Regression Models
lessons.topic: Build and evaluate regression models to predict continuous outcomes on structured datasets.

lessons.title: Classification Models
lessons.topic: Train and compare classification algorithms for categorical prediction tasks and decision boundaries.

lessons.title: Introduction to Deep Learning
lessons.topic: Explain how deep learning extends machine learning with multi-layer neural network architectures.

lessons.title: Neural Network Basics
lessons.topic: Understand neurons, layers, forward propagation, and loss computation in basic neural networks.

lessons.title: Activation Functions
lessons.topic: Compare activation functions such as ReLU, sigmoid, and tanh for nonlinear learning behavior.

lessons.title: Training Neural Networks
lessons.topic: Train neural networks with epochs, batches, validation, and practical training diagnostics.

lessons.title: Backpropagation
lessons.topic: Describe backpropagation mechanics and gradient updates that drive neural network learning.

lessons.title: Optimization Techniques
lessons.topic: Apply optimization methods like SGD, momentum, and Adam for stable model convergence.

lessons.title: Introduction to NLP
lessons.topic: Introduce NLP tasks, language representation, and common real-world text processing scenarios.

lessons.title: Text Processing
lessons.topic: Perform tokenization, stopword removal, stemming, and vectorization for NLP pipelines.

lessons.title: Sentiment Analysis
lessons.topic: Build a sentiment analysis workflow that classifies opinion polarity in text corpora.

lessons.title: Building a Data Science Project
lessons.topic: Plan and execute a complete data science project from business problem to validated results.

lessons.title: End-to-End ML Pipeline
lessons.topic: Design an end-to-end ML pipeline including ingestion, training, evaluation, and inference stages.

lessons.title: Deployment Basics
lessons.topic: Cover model deployment basics, serving options, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.

course.title: Data Science
course.subtitle: Complete Data Science Path from Foundations to Deployment

content.introduction: Data Science combines statistics, programming, and domain knowledge to extract insights and build intelligent solutions. This course teaches a full path from Python and Pandas to machine learning, deep learning, NLP, and deployment fundamentals.

keyConcepts.title: Data Foundations
keyConcepts.description: Understand data collection, cleaning, exploration, and feature preparation workflows.

keyConcepts.title: Model Building
keyConcepts.description: Train and evaluate machine learning and deep learning models for prediction tasks.

keyConcepts.title: Production Thinking
keyConcepts.description: Deploy, monitor, and improve models to deliver long-term real-world impact.
